exemplar.title: What is the relationship between knowledge and culture?

detailedExemplarData.title: What is the relationship between knowledge and culture?

strengths: Three highly specific, personal objects are chosen, each grounded in a clear real-world context.
Strong sensory and narrative detail (e.g. aromaâmemory link in the spice box) that anchors the exhibition in lived experience.
The objects (cookbook, spice box, ghanti) collectively demonstrate varied dimensions of cultural knowledge (culinary, sensory, spiritual).
weaknesses: Commentary remains largely descriptive and emotive, with minimal explicit TOK analysis (ways of knowing, shared vs personal knowledge).
Justifications are unsupported or repetitive; analysis rarely goes beyond broad assertions.
Very limited evidence and references (only a generic web citation); several paragraphs cut off mid-thought, weakening coherence.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition meets the descriptors for the lower end of the 3â4 band: the student identifies three specific objects and their contexts, and offers basic explanations of how each connects to the IA prompt. However, the reasoning is unconvincing and unfocused, with minimal use of TOK concepts, scant evidence, and repeated or incomplete ideas. While personal and sensory details are strong, the lack of deeper analysis and scholarly support constrains the overall performance to 3 marks.

annotations.comment: The selection of your grandmotherâs spice box is well-chosen and clearly grounded in your personal cultural context.

The studentâs choice of a personal family cookbook provides a concrete, specific example showcasing cultural transmission. This grounding in lived experience strengthens the exhibitionâs real-world context.

This narrative is highly descriptive but lacks explicit TOK analysis. The student should introduce concepts such as shared vs personal knowledge or ways of knowing to deepen the link to the IA prompt.
Several claims about cultural values (e.g., generosity) are repeated. Consider consolidating repetitions and providing more analytical depth on how the cookbook mediates shared knowledge.

The link to the prompt is implicit but not articulated. What specific aspects of âknowledgeâ and âcultureâ does the cookbook illustrate? Framing this in TOK terminology will clarify your argument.
The concluding paragraph offers coherent narrative continuity but lacks critical analysis. Consider expanding on how daily practices in the kitchen shape epistemic frameworks.
The final sentence summarizes the journey but relies on broad statements. To strengthen justification, integrate evidence or short quotations from TOK theorists on cultural knowledge.
The commentary would benefit from explicitly connecting the cookbook example to TOK frameworks (e.g., âThis exemplifies how personal knowledge is transmitted through cultural objectsâ¦â).
The explanation of how spices embody stories is descriptive but does not analyse the process by which sensory knowing contributes to cultural understanding. Develop this link.
There is rich sensory detail here, but the student should relate it to shared vs personal knowledge distinctions in TOK to clarify how the spice box functions as an epistemic tool.
This paragraph ends mid-thought, indicating an OCR cut. Ensure the complete idea is presented so the justification is coherent.
Linking the aroma-memory connection to the TOK way of knowing âmemoryâ or âsense perceptionâ would deepen your analysis of how culture shapes knowledge.
You explain how ritual context informs knowledge, but referencing a TOK concept like âknowledge frameworkâ would make the link to the IA prompt more explicit.
The choice of the Ghanti is compelling and adds a spiritual dimension. This specificity enhances the exhibitionâs demonstration of TOK in cultural practices.
The analysis of material and economic history is insightful, but you should connect this to how such factors influence collective knowledge production.
The paragraph cuts off abruptly. Complete your final thought on how the Ghanti encapsulates the relationship between knowledge transmission and ritual practice.
This statement about artifacts mediating knowledge is relevant but would be stronger if tied explicitly to a named TOK concept such as âknowerâs perspectiveâ.
The concluding claim about cultural identity would benefit from a concrete example or quote from TOK literature to show scholarly engagement.
The bibliography lists only one web source. Broaden your evidence base with academic or TOK-specific references to support your analysis.
Consider including citations from TOK course materials or recognized epistemologists to strengthen theoretical grounding.
Diversify your bibliography to include at least one TOK textbook or journal article to demonstrate engagement with established theory.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
